ingredients: 1 whole cooked crab (about 1 kg), cleaned and cracked into pieces
Thumb-size piece ginger, very finely chopped
3 red chillies (2 very finely chopped, 1 sliced)
Rice or steamed buns, to serve
steps: Prepare crab: remove shell and inedible parts, cut body into pieces and crack claws/legs (ask fishmonger if possible).
Heat oil in a wok; sizzle garlic, ginger and chopped chillies for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in ketchup, soy sauce and water to combine.
Add crab pieces and stir-fry on high heat 3-5 minutes until piping hot and coated.
Stir through most coriander and spring onions. Plate and spoon sauce over; garnish with remaining herbs and sliced chilli.
tips: Have the crab prepped and cracked so the sauce can penetrate; keep the heat high so the sauce reduces and clings.
